facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 343 reviews. At a vegetarian bistro in Phu Quoc.

Bếp Chay Nhà An on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is quietly one of the highest-rated restaurants on the island. Plant-based, local, and clearly doing something right.

If you think vegetarian food in Vietnam means skipping flavor, this place will change your mind fast.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 343 people gave this vegetarian spot 4.9 stars. Watch what lands on the table at Bếp Chay Nhà An and you'll get why. Plant-based Phu Quoc hits different here.

instagram.caption:
4.9 stars. 343 reviews. Vegetarian bistro in Phu Quoc.

Bếp Chay Nhà An is not playing around.
